debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2)
n : ℕ
hn : 2 ^ (n + 1) < p
i : ℕ
env : Environment (F p)
input : Var fieldPair (F p)
x y : F p
h_input : Expression.eval env input.1 = x ∧ Expression.eval env input.2 = y
assumptions : ZMod.val x < 2 ^ n ∧ ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n
⊢ ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n

failed_attempts:
have : y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := by omega
    have : y.val + 1 < 2^(n+1) := by
      calc
        y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := by assumption
        _ < 2^(n+1) := by gcongr; linarith
    exact ⟨by simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using this, h_env.right⟩

have hy : y.val < 2^n := assumptions.right
    have hy' : y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mpr hy
    have h_diff : x.val < 2^n ∧ (y + 1).val < 2^(n+1) := ⟨hx, by
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
      · omega
      · have : y.val + 1 < p := by
          have : y.val < 2^n := hy
          have : 2^n < p := by
            have : 2^n ≤ 2^(n+1) := by gcongr; repeat linarith
            exact lt_of_le_of_lt this hn
          omega
        simp [ZMod.val_one]
        omega⟩
    exact LessThan.circuit n hn.completeness i env (x, y + 1) h_env (x, y + 1) rfl h_diff

have hy : y.val < 2^n := assumptions.right
    have h_y1 : y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := Nat.le_of_lt_succ hy
    have h_diff : x.val < 2^n ∧ y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := ⟨hx, h_y1⟩
    have h_lt_assumptions : x.val < 2^n ∧ (y + 1).val < 2^(n+1) := by
      constructor
      · exact hx
      · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        · simp [ZMod.val_one]
          omega
        · simp [ZMod.val_one]
          omega
    exact LessThan.circuit n hn .completeness i env (x, y + 1) h_env (x, y + 1) rfl h_lt_assumptions

have hy : y.val < 2^n := assumptions.right
    have hy' : y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mpr hy
    have h_diff : (y + 1).val = y.val + 1 := by
      simp [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
      linarith
    have h_assumptions' : x.val < 2^n ∧ (y + 1).val < 2^(n+1) := by
      constructor
      · exact hx
      · rw [h_diff]
        have : y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mpr hy
        have : 2^n < 2^(n+1) := by gcongr; linarith
        linarith
    exact LessThan.circuit n hn (x, y + 1) i env (input.1, input.2 + 1)
      (And.intro (by simp [h_input.1]) (by simp [h_input.2, h_diff]))
      h_assumptions'
      h_env

have hy : y.val < 2^n := assumptions.2
    have hyn : y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := by omega
    have hlt : (y + 1).val < 2^(n+1) := by
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
      · simp only [ZMod.val_one]
        omega

have hy : y.val < 2^n := assumptions.right
    have h_y1 : y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := Nat.le_of_lt_succ hy
    have h_diff : x.val < 2^n ∧ y.val + 1 < 2^(n+1) := ⟨hx, by linarith⟩

    · assumption

        have : 2 ^ n < p := by

            _ < p := hn
        have : (y + 1).val < p := by
